chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.85 of 2023 Chakar Khan Versus Mst. Saira Abdul Rauf Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 4516/23 2. For orders on CMA 4517/23 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 4518/23 Dated: 25.10.2023 Mr. Faisal Ahmed A. Memon for appellant. -.-.- A summary suit was decreed by VIII-Additional District Judge Karachi South whereafter, it is claimed, that an appeal was preferred, which was dismissed and perhaps, as stated by the counsel, the matter is now subjudiced before Hon’ble Supreme Court. Nonetheless, the execution application was filed and notices were served upon judgment and on the crucial date i.e. 21.09.2023 it (the execution) was allowed as till then no objections were filed as against that. It is now claimed in this appeal impugning order dated 21.09.2023 that the judgment debtor was not allowed to submit objections. He is still not in a position to submit any objections/grounds as to why decree may not be executed. No case of interference as such is made out. In view of above appeal is dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
